positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a cluster of glowing, oversized bioluminescent mushrooms and intricate vines, forming a graceful, spiraling centerpiece. The color palette is deep indigo, emerald green, and pops of electric teal and gold, suggesting magical energy. Style should be highly graphic, with strong, clean silhouettes and defined linework, reminiscent of Art Deco meets modern nature illustration. Use negative space strategically to isolate the subject and maximize print impact. Composition is centered, with clear visual flow leading to the core glowing elements. Perfect for a modern, elegant t-shirt print, designed for screen printing.
